name: Avantis

supply.notes: Fixed supply of 1B tokens. ~32% unlocked as of April 2026; remaining 68% under vesting.

unlock_schedule.notes: 12-month cliff, then linear vesting over 30 months from September 2025 launch
Released through XP seasons and onchain activity rewards
Distributed to early protocol activity (Feb 2024 onwards), community contributors, influencers
Released to fund SDK applications, Telegram bots, AI agents
For exchange marketing and market-making partnerships

unlocks.notes: Full unlock schedule extends into 2029. Most allocations subject to cliff mechanism.

buyback_burn.revenue_sources: 30% of daily opening, closing, and win fees
buyback_burn.exclusions: Margin fees (→ LPs) and clearing fees (→ treasury) excluded
buyback_burn.notes: Systematic, revenue-linked buyback-and-burn program. Goal: net deflationary token after capital efficiency upgrades.

mechanism.staking: AVNT can be staked for protocol rewards and fee discounts
utility: Staking for rewards and fee discounts
XP boost multipliers for loyalty programs

inflation.current_state: Post-launch vesting phase; deflationary via buyback-burn
inflation.phase: Tokenomics 1.0: 30% daily fee allocation to buyback-burn; planned upgrade to 50% by end Q2 2026
inflation.vesting_inflation: Approximately 68% of supply still vesting; gradual unlock through 2029
inflation.buyback_deflation: 30% of fee revenue burned every 6 hours; rising to 50% after protocol upgrade
inflation.net_inflation_direction: Deflationary once certain protocol upgrades (capital efficiency, risk management) complete

allocation_breakdown.notes: Community-first allocation: ~50% for community (airdrops, incentives, grants) vs ~50% for team/investors/foundation.

data_collection_notes: RESOLVED AS: Avantis (AVNT) — a decentralized perpetual futures DEX on Base with up to 500x leverage across crypto and RWAs. High confidence: all 9 major data aggregators (CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap, Binance, Kraken, Coinbase, Messari, CryptoRank, Bybit, Crypto.com) list identical AVNT = Avantis. Launched Sept 2025 on Base. As of April 2026: $47.4M market cap, $0.1557 price, 1B fixed supply (32% circulating, 68% vesting). Key differentiator: systematic buyback-and-burn (30% of trading fees → burn every 6h, upgrading to 50% by Q2 2026). Team/advisor vesting 12mo cliff + 30mo linear from launch.
